text:
🌟 Prime Land for Sale – Tellapur, Hyderabad 🌟
https://maps.app.goo.gl/zoUvzAbYsTP6XL7x6?g_st=ac

Total Extent:
11 Acres 31 Guntas
Price ₹55 Cr per acre.

A highly premium and strategically located land parcel is available for immediate sale in Tellapur, Hyderabad — one of the fastest-growing and most sought-after investment zones.

🔒 Requirements:

LOI (Letter of Intent)

Buyer Profile

Both are mandatory for the site visit and seller meeting.

The land is well positioned to benefit from:

Excellent connectivity to major employment hubs such as Gachibowli, HITEC City, and the Financial District — ideal for value appreciation, especially for IT professionals or investors.

Close proximity to essential social infrastructure including schools, hospitals, and malls — making it highly suitable for residential or mixed-use development.

Strong demand for residential plots and villa projects in the area — offering great potential for developers and investors, supported by the ongoing real estate growth in Tellapur.

📞 Interested Buyers, Please Contact:

Mohamed Hanif
Managing Director
M/s. AAFRAA REALTORS
Mobile / WhatsApp: 9940581173.
